lang.name: English
app.title: CatifyMe
hero.subtitle: Upload a selfie — get a cartoon cat that matches your vibe
upload.hint: Photo stays on your device, then goes to the AI
upload.preview.title: Your photo
explainer.title: One step from your cat
explainer.body: To generate your cat we use Puter, a free AI service. Sign in to a Puter account once (like signing in with Google). Free credits are included; if you run out, you pay Puter directly. We don't charge you anything.
explainer.note: You only pay for your own usage. Everyone gets a free tier.
result.title: Your cat
error.title: Something went wrong
error.login: Couldn't sign in to Puter. Please try again.
error.vision: Couldn't read the photo. Try another selfie.
error.generate: The cat didn't render. Please try again.
share.text: Find out what cat you are →
